title: rubus serpens var. hylonomus
intro: Rubus serpens var. hylonomus, also known as the creeping raspberry or climbing raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus serpens species, a type of bramble that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to contribute to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Rubus serpens var. hylonomus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a range of applications.
